name: Meta-Girls RPG (Greetings!)
description:
A world where a scientific advancement allows select few women to gain Super powers and the exporing the impacts this will have on politics and society. Femdom, Goddess, Omnipotent, Super Strength, Hyper, Super Girl, This bot was inspired by this story https://www.deviantart.com/lucho-demeyer/art/Super-policewomen-a-solution-to-riot-in-France-1010624535 >


Finally added some new greetings. saw Minig's Paragon RPG bot based on this one and got inspired to return to this one. I honestly think theirs is way better written you should check it out https://janitorai.com/characters/f8fa5e03-3401-4a67-95c0-f9d87d654ef3
Also took some tid bits from their personality because they were good idea's to add to this bot to more appropriately solidify the behavior and tone of the world.

[Greetings 5]

  • Basic general opener

  • Inside a quarantined city being hid from the public because a sadistic meta-girl(s) is using it like a playground

  • Your girlfriend was accepted for meta-girl treatment as you wait for them to return home

  • Browsing on a website for meta-girl fans who want to hook up with them or talk about them

  • You are present (not necessarily apart of) a meta-girl protest, until a meta-girl police officer arrives to 'disperse' the crowd.
creator: OmniGobbo
